What did the bee boy say... she likes a struggle?!
You’re Blinded!
Luckily, you’re able to jump away from the worst of it!
On those words, the hovering slaver darts to your side and swings her whip wildly at your middle! You’re ensnared by the thick energy rope!
With a new shimmer to her shield, she starts using the shadowed ceiling as cover while jumping erratically from spot to spot! Melee attacks are out of the question while she’s flying that high!
No longer tripped!
The whip crackles against you with nerve-agitating energy, sending flushes and frissons all throughout your body!
Good thing you’re safely inside an airtight suit.
You’re just about able to swing your head out of the way before a syrup squirt of her alien jizz flies out of the orchid-like organ!
Oh jeez, you’re covered in a thick squirt of her syrupy, buttery-sweet moth-cum! It’s so dirty!
Overseer Maike
pale green
a psi-whip
armored corset
Fixed CumQ
Jumping and flying from every crevice and cranny
Hovering in the open space
of the pit is the shadow-casting form of Overseer Maike, the head slaver of the mines and general queen bee. Or demon-moth-scorpion, whichever.

With her wings at a full, rapid pelt to keep her afloat, you’re forced to fight her from the ground. She wields a double-barrelled hand-cannon that fires grapples for rapid descent and in the other hand, a coiled up energy whip that glows with sickly purple energy. Her armor is more ornate than protective but you notice the thin wobble in the air around her body that denotes a pretty robust shield array. All around, flood lights follow your actions in the natural gloom of the pit, somehow turning this all into an improvised gladiatorial showdown.\n\nEven from this spot several feet below, you can still make out her blazing orange glare that focuses right on you.
Despite her overtly playful and sexually charged countenance, she seems laser-focused on taking you down.
It’s clear that all this sexual warfare is having an affect on her concentration, especially where her writhing tail-cock is concerned as its petal-plates jitter open randomly.
You notice that the overseer’s concentration is faltering: she can’t stop looking at your assets and can’t stop touching up hers!
The attack comes short of hitting you, and the slaver growls in anger!
